caption: A person's hand is seen manipulating a white cardboard box of collectibles on a table. The setting includes stacks of similar boxes in the background, some featuring the word "CLEARLY" in bold white letters. A small red and white object sits to the left. The person's left hand enters the frame to hold the side of the box, and as the sequence progresses, their right hand reaches in to touch the top of the package. An overlay in the lower right corner shows a man wearing a black baseball cap and a black shirt. Several logos are visible on the screen, including "CASPYS" and "CLEARLY HEAKS," as well as a graphic that says "AUTHENTIC." The action focuses on the handling of the box, with the hand moving from the side to the top surface of the packaging across the frames.
